title.zh: Databricks估值达1880亿美元，延续其作为AI领域关键玩家的势头
title.en: Databricks hits $188B valuation, solidifying its role as a key AI player

summary.zh: 数据平台公司Databricks的估值达到1880亿美元，展现了其成功转型为AI公司的市场认可。该公司还发布了关于开源权重AI模型在编程任务中成本效益的研究报告。
summary.en: Data platform company Databricks has reached a $188B valuation, demonstrating strong market recognition of its successful transformation into an AI company. The firm also published research on the cost savings of open-weight AI models for coding tasks.

title.zh: Vertu推出售价6880美元的AI代理手机，实际性能如何？
title.en: Vertu's $6,880 AI agent phone: how it actually performs

summary.zh: 奢侈品牌Vertu为高管推出一款集成AI代理功能的高价折叠手机。评测重点关注其AI工作流程、电池续航和安全性能等日常使用体验。
summary.en: Luxury brand Vertu targets executives with a premium foldable phone featuring an integrated AI agent. The review focuses on its real-world performance in AI workflows, battery life, and security.

title.zh: Agility Robotics在特斯拉大本营附近开设新机器人培训中心
title.en: Agility Robotics opens new robot training center near Tesla's HQ

summary.zh: 人形机器人公司Agility Robotics在加利福尼亚州弗里蒙特开设新的培训中心，用于其Digit机器人的训练。此举象征着在自动驾驶和AI硬件重镇的扩张。
summary.en: Humanoid robot company Agility Robotics is opening a new training center in Fremont, California, for its Digit robots. This move symbolizes expansion in a hub for autonomous driving and AI hardware.

title.zh: AI驱动的内存短缺冲击印度智能手机市场
title.en: AI-driven memory crunch hits India's smartphone market

summary.zh: AI热潮导致的内存芯片需求激增和供应紧张，正在影响印度智能手机市场，波及产品定价、消费者需求和企业战略。
summary.en: Surging demand for memory chips from the AI boom is causing supply constraints that are impacting India's smartphone market, affecting pricing, consumer demand, and corporate strategies.

title.zh: 苹果对OpenAI的诉讼可能扰乱其IPO计划
title.en: Apple's lawsuit could disrupt OpenAI's IPO plans

summary.zh: 苹果公司已对OpenAI提起商业秘密诉讼。这场备受瞩目的法律纠纷可能对OpenAI的未来发展，特别是其潜在的IPO计划，产生重大影响。
summary.en: Apple has filed a trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI. This high-profile legal battle could significantly impact OpenAI's future, particularly its potential IPO plans.

title.zh: TikTok正在测试AI形象检测工具以识别深度伪造
title.en: TikTok is testing an AI likeness detection tool to spot deepfakes

summary.zh: TikTok开始测试一项新的AI工具，旨在自动扫描和识别由AI生成的用户形象（如深度伪造），并允许创作者进行举报。
summary.en: TikTok has begun testing a new AI tool designed to automatically scan for and identify AI-generated user likenesses, such as deepfakes, and allow creators to report them.

title.zh: OpenAI发布GPT-Red：通过自我对弈提升AI安全性和鲁棒性
title.en: OpenAI unveils GPT-Red: self-play for improving AI safety and robustness

summary.zh: OpenAI介绍了其自动化红队系统GPT-Red，该系统利用自我对弈（self-play）来持续改进AI模型的安全性、对齐性和抵御提示注入攻击的能力。
summary.en: OpenAI details its automated red-teaming system, GPT-Red, which uses self-play to continuously improve AI model safety, alignment, and resistance to prompt injection attacks.

title.zh: OpenAI提出面向AI时代的实用记分卡，用于衡量投资回报
title.en: OpenAI proposes a practical scorecard for measuring AI ROI

summary.zh: OpenAI首席财务官提出一套AI时代记分卡框架，通过“有用工作量”、“单任务成本”、“可靠性”和“计算回报率”等指标来评估AI的实际投资回报。
summary.en: OpenAI's CFO introduces an AI-age scorecard framework to evaluate real-world ROI through metrics like 'useful work', 'cost per successful task', 'dependability', and 'return on compute'.

title.zh: 阶跃星辰印奇在WAIC 2026演讲：当智能体走进物理世界
title.en: StepFun CEO speaks at WAIC 2026: when AI agents enter the physical world

summary.zh: 在世界人工智能大会上，阶跃星辰董事长印奇发表主题演讲，探讨AI智能体从虚拟世界走向物理世界的过程，并回顾了其15年的AI创业历程。
summary.en: At the World Artificial Intelligence Conference, StepFun CEO Yin Qi discussed the journey of AI agents from virtual to physical spaces, reflecting on his 15 years in AI entrepreneurship.

title.zh: 红杉、高瓴投资模感科技，研发机器人全身多模态触觉系统
title.en: Sequoia and Hillhouse back MoSense for whole-body robotic tactile system

summary.zh: 机器人触觉技术初创公司模感科技获得数千万元天使轮融资，由红杉中国、高瓴创投及智元机器人投资，用于研发机器人全身多模态触觉感知系统。
summary.en: Robotic tactile tech startup MoSense has secured tens of millions in angel funding from Sequoia China, Hillhouse Capital, and Zhiyuan Robotics to develop whole-body multimodal tactile perception systems.
